concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: Appendix A provides a sample delimited data file with approximately 39 lines of data. The extraction pipeline erroneously aggressively deduplicated these lines (indicated by 'duplicates_removed: 41' in the page 3 metadata) and only extracted 6 of the 39 data rows, resulting in a severe truncation of the sample dataset.
concerns.output_quote: Contains only 6 rows of data (e.g., the last one extracted is '0111329, 140, 1, 8, 8, 0004300700, 28.5, . , 17, 430, 8835020301, 0, 11, 1, 223,'). Most of the section is missing.
concerns.location: Page 3, Appendix A Example .txt delimited data file

concerns.analysis: The source PDF contains a large data dictionary table spanning pages 7, 8, and 9 (Appendix C). The table headers ('Rec. Type', 'Column #', 'Field Name', etc.) appear on page 7 and are repeated at the top of page 9. The extraction pipeline failed to merge the entire structure into a single continuous table. While it successfully merged page 8's data into the table object on page 7, it created a completely separate table object on page 9 for the remaining rows. This violates the rule that multi-pa
concerns.source_pdf_quote: A single continuous data dictionary table spanning pages 7, 8, and 9, with headers ('Rec. Type', 'Column #', 'Field Name', etc.) repeating at the top of page 9.
concerns.output_quote: The JSON contains a table object on page 7 (incorporating page 8 data) and a separate second table object on page 9 starting with the repeated header row.
